markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and define the new LLM-driven FAQ project.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Driving Growth:** Publishing 10 articles/day has driven Search Console impressions to a new high of 14,537, confirming the strategy is expanding reach.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**New LLM-Driven FAQ Project:** Launching an FAQ project in the blog to capture Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) traffic by providing structured answers to common questions, inspired by a successful Engine.com experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Case Studies Depleted:** The content pipeline is empty after completing all 71 case studies from the shared spreadsheet; new material is needed to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Competitive Pressure:** The project is partly a response to competitor Cherry, whose recent content activity (e.g., AI crawler traffic) highlights the need for a more robust AEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Review

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** 10 articles/day, with 95 published to date.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**Search Console Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [**Impressions:** 14,537 (new all-time high).](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [**Clicks:** Recovering from a dip.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Analytics Anomaly:** A spike to 777 active users with a drastically low time-on-site was identified as an AI crawler likely from competitor Cherry.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Current Analytics:**](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Active Users:** 351](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**New Users:** 84](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Time on Site:** 1m 23s](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Key Events:** Steadily increasing, especially "shop directory views."](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**December Traffic:** Historically stable, with no expected seasonal dip.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### New Project: LLM-Driven FAQ Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Capture Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) traffic by making content easily consumable for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** LLMs are "lazy" (compute-constrained), so providing simple, structured Q\&A content will improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [**Model:** Based on a successful experiment for Engine.com, which used Reddit scrapes to identify primary and related questions.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [Create a new "FAQs" category in the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [Use Yoast's built-in FAQ schema to provide structured data for AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The blog is crawled more frequently for recency, which is a strong AEO signal.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [**Content Sourcing:**](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Initial:** Non-branded questions identified via Reddit scrapes.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**Future:** Insights from sales/SDR calls to inform B2B-focused questions.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**PR Angle:** Position the project as an environmentally friendly initiative, as optimizing for LLMs reduces compute power.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

### Project Logistics

  - [**Case Studies:** The content pipeline is empty. All 71 case studies from the shared spreadsheet are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [**Scrunch Access:** Jason has direct access to the Scrunch account for self-service reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Measure the FAQ project's impact on visibility by comparing metrics against a baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Package the LLM-driven FAQ project scope for Sunbit review tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Sunbit:** Provide new case study materials to replenish the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [**Sunbit:** Explore using sales/SDR call insights to inform future FAQ content.](https://fathom.video/share/aucgbh3M1dvuNiK-PyydA677YHidpVRk?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
